# Abdul Web Agency

> Founder-led web agency building modern, mobile-first websites for growing businesses — affordable, professional, WhatsApp-integrated.

Abdul Web Agency designs and develops business websites, product catalog sites, and e-commerce sites. We focus on clean design, fast delivery (1–3 weeks), mobile responsiveness, and lead-generation features such as enquiry forms and WhatsApp chat integration.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Services overview, portfolio highlights, process, and contact.
- [Portfolio](/#portfolio): Examples of business, product catalog, and e-commerce websites with filtering by type and features.
- [Services](/#services): What we build and how we work.
- [About](/#about): Founder background and approach.
- [Process](/#process): How a project moves from enquiry to launch.
- [FAQ](/#faq): Pricing, timelines, custom features, and WhatsApp integration.
- [Contact](/#contact): Enquiry form, email, phone, and WhatsApp.
